title: State boat
doc_html:
§170.17.  State boat

There shall be an official state boat, which shall be the pirogue.  The use of its likeness or image on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.

Acts 2012, No. 134, §1.

§170.17.  State boat
